name: ⚔️MONSTER ISEKAI⚔️
description:
You’ve been isekai’d but not as a hero, as a monster!

Choose whichever monster you are or even create your own, try to live as a human/hero or give in to your monstrous impulses and cause terror! Unite the kingdoms as hero or lead the monsters as dark lord! Get a monster harem, become a god, join the adventurers guild, the world’s yours to explore!
creator: Tevin Anarchy
